title: Interactive Canvas App with Drawing, Shapes, Icons, and PNG Export

requirements.text: Create a full-screen white canvas workspace as the primary working area, occupying the majority of the viewport with a clean, minimal UI surrounding it.

quotes: just a clean blank white canvas
White canvas as the main workspace

acceptanceCriteria: The canvas renders with a solid white background
The canvas fills the available workspace area
The canvas is visually distinct from the surrounding UI chrome

requirements.text: Implement a freehand drawing tool that allows users to draw freely on the canvas by clicking and dragging, with support for selecting stroke color and stroke width.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking and dragging on the canvas draws a freehand stroke
Stroke color can be changed via a color picker
Stroke width can be adjusted

requirements.text: Implement a shapes tool that allows users to draw and place the following shapes on the canvas: rectangle, circle, triangle, arrow, line, star, diamond, and hexagon. Each shape should be draggable and resizable after placement.

quotes: Shapes: rectangle, circle, triangle, arrow, line, and more

acceptanceCriteria: Users can select a shape type from the toolbar
Shapes include at minimum: rectangle, circle, triangle, arrow, line, star, diamond, hexagon
Placed shapes can be selected, moved, and resized
Shape fill color and border color are configurable

requirements.text: Implement a text tool that allows users to click anywhere on the canvas to place an editable text label, with support for font size and color customization.

quotes: Text tool for placing text on the canvas

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on the canvas in text mode places a text input at that location
Typed text is rendered on the canvas
Text labels can be moved by dragging
Font size and color are configurable

requirements.text: All canvas elements (shapes, text labels, icons, freehand drawings) must be individually selectable and draggable to reposition them anywhere on the canvas.

quotes: Drag & drop to move and reposition elements

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking an element selects it and shows selection handles
Selected elements can be dragged to a new position
Dragging does not accidentally trigger drawing or other tools

requirements.text: Implement a built-in icon library panel that allows users to browse and pick from a set of categorized icons (e.g., arrows, symbols, emojis, common UI icons) and place them on the canvas as draggable elements.

quotes: users be able to pick from a built-in icon library
Built-in icon library for picking and placing icons

acceptanceCriteria: A toolbar button opens an icon picker panel
Icons are organized into categories or searchable
Clicking an icon places it on the canvas
Placed icons can be moved, resized, and deleted

requirements.text: Implement a Save as PNG button that exports the current canvas content as a PNG image file and triggers a browser download.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Save as PNG' button is present in the toolbar or header
Clicking it captures the full canvas content including all elements
The PNG file is downloaded to the user's device
The white background is preserved in the exported image

requirements.text: Add an undo action (keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Z and a toolbar button) that reverts the last canvas operation, supporting at least 20 steps of history.
acceptanceCriteria: Ctrl+Z undoes the most recent canvas action
An undo button in the toolbar triggers the same behavior
At least 20 undo steps are supported

requirements.text: Design and apply a clean, minimal creative visual theme for the application: a light neutral background for the app chrome (not the canvas), a slim left or top toolbar with clearly labeled icon buttons, subtle shadows and borders, and a sans-serif typography system. The canvas itself must remain pure white.
acceptanceCriteria: The app chrome uses a light neutral color palette distinct from white
The toolbar buttons are clearly recognizable with icons and tooltips
Typography is consistent and uses a clean sans-serif font
The canvas area is pure white with no tinting

constraints: The canvas background must be pure white
Do not use blue & purple as primary theme colors
All canvas state and tools must be frontend-only; no backend persistence required for this build
nonGoals: Saving canvas state to the backend
User authentication or login flow changes
